mapper.insert: INSERT INTO report (title, report_type, status, template_id, period_start, period_end, generated_by, generated_time, approved_by, approved_time, file_url, description, created_at) VALUES (#{title}, #{reportType}, #{status}, #{templateId}, #{periodStart}, #{periodEnd}, #{generatedBy}, #{generatedTime}, #{approvedBy}, #{approvedTime}, #{fileUrl}, #{description}, NOW())
